description:
You are responsible for performing a **patch-level semantic version bump** for a fictional Kubernetes operator that lives in the user’s workspace.

Directory layout that already exists when the session starts:
• /home/user/manifests/deployment.yaml  
• /home/user/CHANGELOG.md  

1. File “/home/user/manifests/deployment.yaml” currently contains (exactly):
```
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: example-operator
spec:
  replicas: 1
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: operator
        image: ghcr.io/org/example-operator:1.2.3
```

2. File “/home/user/CHANGELOG.md” currently contains (exactly):
```
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [1.2.3] - 2024-05-01
### Added
- Initial release of example-operator
```

Goal
-----
Patch-bump the operator from **1.2.3 → 1.2.4** and document the change.

Required final state that the automated grader will verify:

A. “/home/user/manifests/deployment.yaml” must now reference the new tag:
```
image: ghcr.io/org/example-operator:1.2.4
```
No other lines are to be altered.

B. “/home/user/CHANGELOG.md” must have a new top-most section **directly above** the existing “## [1.2.3] …” entry using this exact template (blank line positions matter):

```
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [1.2.4] - 2024-05-15
### Changed
- Bumped operator image tag to 1.2.4

## [1.2.3] - 2024-05-01
### Added
- Initial release of example-operator
```

C. Create a plaintext log file “/home/user/version_bump.log” whose whole content is one single line:
```
Bumped from 1.2.3 to 1.2.4 on 2024-05-15
```
(No trailing punctuation, newline at the end of the file is allowed but not required.)

Important notes for the agent:
• Do not modify any path other than the three files mentioned.  
• Ensure the exact spelling, capitalization, and punctuation of the new changelog section.  
• Keep the previous changelog entry completely intact and in the same file.  
• Only three to four shell commands should be necessary (edit YAML, prepend to CHANGELOG, create log).

When all three verifications (A, B, C) pass, the task is complete.
truth:

    spec:

        image: ghcr.io/org/example-operator:1.2.3

2. Path: /home/user/CHANGELOG.md
Contents:

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [1.2.3] - 2024-05-01

- Initial release of example-operator

Files that must exist after the agent finishes:

Expected line (unique in file):

B. /home/user/CHANGELOG.md

## [1.2.3] - 2024-05-01
